title: Aetherium
description: Adds a resource slightly stronger than Netherite called Aetherium.
body:
Adds a resource slightly stronger than Netherite called Aetherium.
- Aetherium Shard Ore generates in a very small portion of the Overworld, only between Y -16 and Y 16. It does spawn in all biomes.
- The ore can only be mined with a diamond pickaxe or higher.
- Each ore only drops one shard, with or without fortune.
- Put four shards and four diamonds together in a crafting table, shapelessly, to create an Aetherium Ingot.
- Then combine the ingot with an Aetherium Smithing Upgrade and any Netherite tool to make an Aetherium tool.
- Crafting recipes shown in gallery.
